task_completion.description: Create a 2x2 matrix diagram with the correct title.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the EdrawMax canvas showing a 2x2 grid or matrix layout. The diagram must include a title or header text reading exactly 'Cloud Database Migration SWOT Analysis'.

task_completion.description: Label the quadrants and apply different background colors.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the 2x2 matrix on the EdrawMax canvas. The four quadrants must be labeled STRENGTHS, WEAKNESSES, OPPORTUNITIES, and THREATS. Each of the four quadrants must have a distinct background color.

task_completion.description: Add the required content to the STRENGTHS and WEAKNESSES quadrants.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the text inside the STRENGTHS quadrant for keywords like 'cost', 'scalability', 'community', and 'integration'. Look at the WEAKNESSES quadrant for keywords like 'expertise', 'timeline', 'loss', and 'support'.

task_completion.description: Add the required content to the OPPORTUNITIES and THREATS quadrants.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the text inside the OPPORTUNITIES quadrant for keywords like 'Aurora', 'modernize', 'region', and 'lock-in'. Look at the THREATS quadrant for keywords like 'compliance', 'compatibility', 'competitor', and 'attrition'.

task_completion.description: Save the editable diagram as an EDDX file to the Documents folder.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for an EdrawMax 'Save As' dialog or a file manager window showing the file 'swot_cloud_migration.eddx' being saved to or existing in the '/home/ga/Documents' directory.

task_completion.description: Export the diagram as a PDF file to the Documents folder.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for an EdrawMax 'Export' dialog, a PDF viewer, or a file manager window showing the file 'swot_cloud_migration.pdf' being saved to or existing in the '/home/ga/Documents' directory.

integrity.description: The agent used the EdrawMax graphical user interface to create the diagram.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for screenshots showing the EdrawMax application open with the diagram being actively edited on the canvas, rather than just terminal commands or scripts generating files.

integrity.description: The agent used actual diagram shapes and text boxes rather than pasting a single flat image or text block.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for selection handles, shape outlines, or text editing cursors within the individual quadrants of the matrix in EdrawMax.

integrity.description: The PDF was exported from the application rather than created via a terminal conversion tool.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for the EdrawMax export menu, print dialog, or save-as-PDF interface being used.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected EDDX path: /home/ga/Documents/swot_cloud_migration.eddx. Expected PDF path: /home/ga/Documents/swot_cloud_migration.pdf. Required Title: 'Cloud Database Migration'. Required Strengths keywords: cost, scalability, community, integration. Required Weaknesses keywords: expertise, timeline, loss, support. Required Opportunities keywords: Aurora, modernize, region, lock-in. Required Threats keywords: compliance, compatibility, competitor, attrition.
